audience: ASL-using learners ages 12–18 developing written English
instructions: Ask learners to rewrite each sentence independently. Do not show corrections during the assessment.

items.preReference: The book is under the chair.
items.postReference: The dog waits beside the gate.

items.post: Last night I watch a movie.
items.postReference: Last night I watched a movie.

items.preReference: We go to the library after school.
items.postReference: He arrived at the station early.

items.preReference: I will go to the store tomorrow.

items.pre: Next week we visited our cousin.
items.post: Two days ago they play basketball.
items.preReference: Next week we will visit our cousin.
items.postReference: Two days ago they played basketball.
I am excited about the trip.
